name: Demae-Can Co.,Ltd
summary: Demae-Can Co., Ltd operates delivery site Demae-can in Japan. The company provides food delivery service that enables its users to order from a range of restaurants. It also sells bottles of shochu, wine, and other beverages then to restaurants. The company was formerly known as Yume no Machi Souzou Iinkai Co., Ltd. Demae-Can Co., Ltd was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
